'''鈭歾-w-s''' ('''zawasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whitemail|whitemail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whitemail|whitemail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-w-s
|-
! Lemma
| zawasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawasithi|zawasithi]] || [[word:zawasiji|zawasiji]] || [[word:zawasishi|zawasishi]] || [[word:zawasi|zawasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawasuthuth|zawasuthuth]] || [[word:zawasujuj|zawasujuj]] || [[word:zawasushush|zawasushush]] || [[word:zawas|zawas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawasuthu|zawasuthu]] || [[word:zawasuju|zawasuju]] || [[word:zawasushu|zawasushu]] || [[word:zawasu|zawasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawasufuth|zawasufuth]] || [[word:zawasufuj|zawasufuj]] || [[word:zawasufush|zawasufush]] || [[word:zawasuf|zawasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawasethe|zawasethe]] || [[word:zawaseje|zawaseje]] || [[word:zawaseshe|zawaseshe]] || [[word:zawase|zawase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawasothoth|zawasothoth]] || [[word:zawasojoj|zawasojoj]] || [[word:zawasoshosh|zawasoshosh]] || [[word:zawas|zawas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawasotho|zawasotho]] || [[word:zawasojo|zawasojo]] || [[word:zawasosho|zawasosho]] || [[word:zawaso|zawaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawasofoth|zawasofoth]] || [[word:zawasofoj|zawasofoj]] || [[word:zawasofosh|zawasofosh]] || [[word:zawasof|zawasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawas忙th忙|zawas忙th忙]] || [[word:zawas忙j忙|zawas忙j忙]] || [[word:zawas忙sh忙|zawas忙sh忙]] || [[word:zawas忙|zawas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawasathath|zawasathath]] || [[word:zawasajaj|zawasajaj]] || [[word:zawasashash|zawasashash]] || [[word:zawas|zawas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawasatha|zawasatha]] || [[word:zawasaja|zawasaja]] || [[word:zawasasha|zawasasha]] || [[word:zawasa|zawasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawasafath|zawasafath]] || [[word:zawasafaj|zawasafaj]] || [[word:zawasafash|zawasafash]] || [[word:zawasaf|zawasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zawasasha|zawasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozawasasha|gozawasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizawasasha|gokizawasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zawasn眉sha|zawasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozawasnkn眉sha|gozawasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizawasn眉sha|gokizawasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zawash毛sha|zawash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozawasnksh毛sha|gozawasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizawash毛sha|gokizawash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawasrosha|zawasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawasnkrosha|gozawasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawasrosha|gokizawasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zawasmusha|zawasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawasnkmusha|gozawasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawasmusha|gokizawasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zawasherasha|zawasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozawasnksherasha|gozawasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizawasherasha|gokizawasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zawasngasha|zawasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozawasnkngasha|gozawasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizawasngasha|gokizawasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zawasyasha|zawasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozawasnkyasha|gozawasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizawasyasha|gokizawasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zawasyamasha|zawasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozawasnkyamasha|gozawasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizawasyamasha|gokizawasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawasn眉sh毛sha|zawasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawasnkn眉sh毛sha|gozawasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawasn眉sh毛sha|gokizawasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawasn眉rosha|zawasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawasnkn眉rosha|gozawasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawasn眉rosha|gokizawasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawasn眉musha|zawasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawasnkn眉musha|gozawasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawasn眉musha|gokizawasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawash毛n眉sha|zawash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawasnksh毛n眉sha|gozawasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawash毛n眉sha|gokizawash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawash毛rosha|zawash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawasnksh毛rosha|gozawasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawash毛rosha|gokizawash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawash毛musha|zawash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawasnksh毛musha|gozawasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawash毛musha|gokizawash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawasron眉sha|zawasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawasnkron眉sha|gozawasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawasron眉sha|gokizawasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawasrosh毛sha|zawasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawasnkrosh毛sha|gozawasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawasrosh毛sha|gokizawasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawasromusha|zawasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawasnkromusha|gozawasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawasromusha|gokizawasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawasmun眉sha|zawasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawasnkmun眉sha|gozawasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawasmun眉sha|gokizawasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawasmush毛sha|zawasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawasnkmush毛sha|gozawasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawasmush毛sha|gokizawasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawasmurosha|zawasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawasnkmurosha|gozawasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawasmurosha|gokizawasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zawas|zawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙w忙s|z忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozawas|hozawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙w忙s|hoz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozawas|hohozawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙w忙s|hohoz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zawas|n眉zawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙w忙s|n眉z忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zawas|n眉n眉zawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙w忙s|n眉n眉z忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zawas|n茂zawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙w忙s|n茂z忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zawas|n茂n茂zawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙w忙s|n茂n茂z忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzawas|luzawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙w忙s|luz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzawas|luluzawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙w忙s|luluz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizawas|lizawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙w忙s|liz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizawas|lilizawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙w忙s|liliz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozawas|kozawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙w忙s|koz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozawas|kokozawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙w忙s|kokoz忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezawas|kezawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙w忙s|kez忙w忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezawas|kekezawas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙w忙s|kekez忙w忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
